label: ProcAgent V3

trigger_run.notes: LOLBin probe fires heavily on macOS due to legitimate system tool usage (osascript, curl, etc.). binary_from_temp fires on processes running from /tmp or ~/Downloads. No explicit trigger injection needed — live system provides rich process data.

fixes_applied: setup(): cert check changed from return False to logger.warning() (dev mode tolerant)
collect_data(): SecurityEvent sub-messages with mitre_techniques, risk_score, analyst_notes
collect_data(): attributes map for evidence instead of tags-based MITRE encoding
collect_data(): always emits system_metrics METRIC event (heartbeat)
dark_spots: LOLBin false positive rate is high on macOS (system tools used legitimately)
Process tree probe requires parent process to still be running
No code signing or notarization validation on flagged binaries
No memory forensics or injected code detection
Long-lived process probe threshold may need tuning
